verses.1: A Psalm of David, when he was in the wilderness of Judah. God, You are my God; I shall be watching for You; My soul thirsts for You, my flesh yearns for You, In a dry and exhausted land where there is no water.
verses.2: So have I seen You in the sanctuary, To see Your power and glory.
verses.3: Because Your favor is better than life, My lips will praise You.
verses.4: So I will bless You as long as I live; I will lift up my hands in Your name.
verses.5: My soul is satisfied as with fat and fatness, And my mouth offers praises with joyful lips.
verses.6: When I remember You on my bed, I meditate on You in the night watches,
verses.7: For You have been my help, And in the shadow of Your wings I sing for joy.
verses.8: My soul clings to You; Your right hand takes hold of me.
verses.9: But those who seek my life to destroy it, Will go into the depths of the earth.
verses.10: They will be turned over to the power of the sword; They will be a prey for foxes.
verses.11: But the king will rejoice in God; Everyone who swears by Him will boast, For the mouths of those who speak lies will be stopped.
